summary: The team finalized the scope for the AI Meeting Notes Assistant demo, reviewed provider support, export formats, and quality expectations for action item descriptions.
decisions: The demo will use both OpenAI and Ollama as selectable providers.
Version one will focus on TXT upload, structured JSON, Markdown, and PDF export.
Calendar integration will not be included in this phase.

action_items.task: Finish the upload screen and JSON preview for the Streamlit interface.
action_items.evidence: Priya said she will finish the upload screen and JSON preview by Thursday.

action_items.task: Prepare the sales report, include regional numbers, and submit it to Mr. Kenil.
action_items.evidence: Rahul said he will prepare the sales report and submit it by Friday, May 3.

action_items.task: Retest the PDF download and verify the export formatting issue is resolved.
action_items.evidence: Aisha said QA found a PDF export formatting issue and she needs to retest it before end of week.

action_items.task: Share the final sample transcript with the portfolio README.
action_items.evidence: Rahul said he will share the final sample transcript with the portfolio README by Friday.

action_items.task: Write test cases for JSON parsing, Markdown export, and missing deadline evaluation.
action_items.evidence: Aisha said she will write three test cases by Monday.

follow_ups: Consider Google Calendar integration for version two.
